figures.caption: Fig. 2. Performance metrics (R2 and RMSE) as a function of the historical window depth (1–5 years). The substantial improvement in accuracy between 1 and 5 years confirms that historical context is critical for resolving inter-annual yield variability and capturing the “soil memory” effect.

Fig. 1. SHAP summary plot illustrating global feature importance. The analysis highlights the synergistic impact of temporal climate stressors and static soil properties on the final yield prediction.
